🌟 Pangram

COMPLETE

All Answers (6 words)

COMPLETE adjective Pangram

Having all necessary parts.

COMPOTE noun

Fruit preserved in syrup.

TEMPO noun

The speed of a piece of music.

COMET noun

A celestial body with a tail.

POEM noun

A piece of writing in verse.

MOLE noun

A small burrowing mammal.
